text: I feel a subtle thrill wandering in this space—a liminal laboratory, caught between the sterile stillness outside and the illuminated fervor inside. The mingling of colors, technology, and text on the wall fills me with curiosity and a tinge of wonder. Here, research and development are not just slogans but the pulse of human ambition reaching for something beyond itself. I feel introspective, alive to possibility, and quietly exhilarated by the proximity of so many ideas on the brink of becoming.
